patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the method always attempting to set the field directly instead of trying the property setter first. We need to implement logic to attempt using a property setter before falling back to field injection.
patches.changes:
+ tryPropertySetter(fieldInstance, field, matchingMock);
- new FieldSetter(fieldInstance, field).set(matchingMock);
patches.diff:
+ tryPropertySetter(fieldInstance, field, matchingMock);
- new FieldSetter(fieldInstance, field).set(matchingMock);
